arch-map.description: Map Isaac modules into architecture roles
arch-map.template: Analyze this repository and map the main files into architecture roles: core, executor, memory, tooling, tests, governance, interfaces. Be file-specific and strict.

routing-audit.template: Inspect isaac_core.py and low_complexity.py. Identify where routing authority is split between classification and detect_intent/PATTERNS logic. Do not modify code yet.

executor-audit.template: Inspect executor.py and explain whether executor still has any hidden routing or tool-decision authority. Be strict and concrete. Do not modify code yet.

stability-tests.template: Only improve tests in tests_phase_a_stabilization.py. Add meaningful tests for routing consistency, lightweight short-circuits, strategy propagation, retrieval stability, and no accidental tool overreach. Do not change runtime code unless a test reveals a small necessary fix.
